Authorized access

Technical information for previously validated users.

Restricted information should be hosted on a separate platform with authentication, role control, activity logs and confidentiality agreements.

Demonstration interface. Real authentication requires a secure backend.

Conceptual architecture

Sign in

Request access

Security

Minimum requirements for the production system

  • Multi-factor authentication
  • Manual user approval
  • Access by organization, role and project
  • Activity and download logs
  • Expiring links and permissions
  • Terms and NDA acceptance
  • Hosting and encryption approved by IT

Technology engineering and integration for organizations operating in critical environments.

Capabilities
